title: Ultra-Processed Food Expository Visualization
description: Data visualization project intended to show the lack of non ultra-processed choices among the top 10 ultra-processed categories in Target, Walmart, and Whole Foods

title: Police Reform Results Persuasive and Deceptive Visualization
description: Data visualization group project in which we designed one visualization showcasing the increase in complaints against officers despite reform efforts and another arguing the opposite point: that police reform efforts have led to more officers being held accountable.

title: IEEE-HKN Projects Portal
description: Team project where the final product was a webpage for the UCSD Chapter of IEEE-HKN that showcases projects, provides information about the project showcase, and implements a chatbot specific to HKN and HKN projects information using RAG techniques.

title: Study on the Relationship Between PM2.5 Levels and Birthweight between White and Non-White Groups
description: A group project performing inference testing through OLS regression and a permutation test to conclude that PM2.5 levels did not affect different race groups differently, but that race group was a good predictor of birthweight.

title: Power Outage Analysis and Prediction Model
description: This project included inference testing, finding that there are significantly more power outages in high urbanization areas, and model building to predict whether a power outage will be severe using a Random Forest Classifier.

title: Data Manipulation Project
description: This project explored manipulating images, such as through negation or pixelating, and audio, such as through reversing or applying reverb, as well as designing a K Nearest Neighbor Classifier to predict image labels.

title: Correlation Between Population Growth and Human-Induced Wildfires
description: This group project included designing a data analysis project to analyze the relationship between human-induced wildfires and population growth in California, identifying geospatial and time series analysis as methods to perform analysis.

title: Statistical Inference, Data Visualization, and Sentiment Analysis of 'Friends'
description: A group project involving extensive statistical inference and data visualization for different aspects of the TV show 'Friends' including a sentiment analysis of each character's lines.

title: Investigation of Customer Demographic for a Coding Bootcamp
description: This group project for the ASA Fall Data Challenge explored the interest level, target market, coding languages, and potential profit for a coding bootcamp using statistical inference.

title: Investigation of Material Footprint Per Capita Across the World
description: This project consists of a thorough investigation of Material Footprint Per Capita across countries and continents, with a focus on data visualization and visualization analysis.

title: Analysis of Low Food Security Proportions Over Time
description: A group project entry for the ASA Statistics Project Competition that explored the increasing trend in proportion of households with very low food security and fit a quadratic model to the association.

title: Analysis of Forest Fire Impact
description: Group project for the ASA Data Visualization Poster Competition performing an analysis of forest fire intensity and area over time, geospatial analysis, and affect on public global warming perception.
